name: Asteria Launch

brand.name: Asteria
brand.promise: Turn fragmented climate data into confident action.
brand.visualDirection: Editorial clarity, luminous gradients and generous space; pair labeled menu items with restrained monoline icons—layers for Platform, compass for Approach, chart for Insights and arrow for Talk to us—while retaining text labels

landing.headline: Clarity for every climate decision.
landing.subhead: Turn fragmented operational and climate data into confident, measurable action.

benefits.title: One trusted picture
benefits.body: Bring operational, supplier and climate signals into a decision-ready view.

benefits.title: From insight to action
benefits.body: Prioritise the moves that reduce risk and create measurable progress.

benefits.title: Built for alignment
benefits.body: Give every team the same language, evidence and next steps.

landing.finalHeadline: Move from climate ambition to operational clarity.

slides.title: Climate intelligence for decisions that matter
slides.body: A launch narrative powered by one executable brand system.

slides.title: Turn fragmented signals into coordinated action
bullets: Keep teams aligned around measurable progress

lastSummary: Refined the selected web hero with lighter editorial typography, more deliberate spacing, elevated CTA styling, and a layered luminous orb. Copy and the selection bridge remain unchanged.
